title: PRIMA HOUSEWARES Wooden Shoe Boot Trainer Rack Storage Shelf Organiser Stand Unit - Walnut - 3 Tier
features: Easy and quick assembly, no tools required.
3 Tier - W74cm x H48.5cm x D26.5cm
description: Elevate your home organization with our Wooden Shoe Rack, the ideal space-saving storage solution for all your footwear. This shoe rack is designed with a robust and durable wooden construction, ensuring it stands the test of time while adding a stylish touch to any room. Key Features: Space-Saving Design: Optimize your storage space efficiently. Durable Wooden Construction: Crafted from high-quality wood for superior strength and longevity. Effortless Assembly: Quick and easy to assemble with no tools required. 3-Tier Structure: Measuring W74cm x H48.5cm x D26.5cm, providing ample space for multiple pairs of shoes. Keep your shoes neatly organized and easily accessible with this practical and elegant 3-tier wooden shoe rack.
